query:
SELECT 
  LENGTH(tastytrade_client_id) as client_id_length,
  LENGTH(tastytrade_client_secret) as client_secret_length,
  LENGTH(tastytrade_refresh_token) as refresh_token_length,
  updated_at
FROM api_credentials 
WHERE user_id = 1;
